ddt:Target.Name: DCM12 - L4B80 - v9.5
ddt:Target.Description:
Injection Common Rail DELPHI DCM1.2
Applications : J77 Logiciels : L4B80 et ultérieurs
Date : 18/01/2005 Auteur : Sonia SCRIGNAC Email : sonia.scrignac@delphi.com Tel. : 33 (0)1 69 27 79 02 API : FR CTL L49 2 65
--------------------------------------------------- Documents de référence
DTC et données d'environnements : A_DG_DGFLT_L4B7_J77_75x_EU3_EOBD_1.2.xls Datas, trames et services : R6510416 ISSUE 17.0 "Diagnostic services for Diag on CAN (J77)"
--------------------------------------------------- Historique
V9.5 : Modifications des données en 32 bits non signées en données en 31bits non signées.
V9.4 : Passage en 32bits des données en 31bits.
V9.3: Ajout du champ Data Ref pour les données de la trame de traçabilité.
V9.2 : Modification des formules de conversion des données EGR_Feedback et EGR_Demand pour les freeze frames.
V9.1 : Modification de la forumule de conversion de la donnée d'environnement VGT_So_operation_state (dans la freeze frame)
V9.0 : Ajout d'un mode de ECUReset Ajout dans la trame $AE de la donnée IM_EOL_Priming_done_NVV (pour sauvegarde lecture/écriture) Mise à jour des FF, des DTC associés de la donnée First DTC. Modification de la trame 3B $AE afin de détailler les données moteurs en écriture. Suppression de l'écran de "Output Control" -> Utiliser l'écran générique de DDT pour cette fonction.

Data.Name: Air extern temperature_linearised
Data.Comment: Extern air temperature linearised

Data.Name: Air Inlet Temperature_linearised
Data.Comment: Air_temp_inlet_linearised

Data.Name: Air mass flow demand
Data.Comment: valeur de débit d'air demandée

Data.Name: Air Mass Flow Linearised
Data.Comment: Air mass flow linearised for freeze frame

Data.Name: allumage voyant MIL par OBD
Data.Comment: MIL ON

Data.Name: AMF_control_out
Data.Comment: Output value of AMF Control

Data.Name: AOS_fuel_trim
Data.Comment: fuel trim added or subtracted to damp any speed oscillation during

Data.Name: APS_sync_state
Data.Comment: this indicates the state of the synchronising of the APS system

Data.Name: Atmospheric Pressure
Data.Comment: pression atmosphérique vu par le calculateur (capteur interne ou externe)

Data.Name: Atmospheric Pressure Linearised
Data.Comment: atmospheric pressure linearised for freeze frame

Data.Name: Atmospheric Pressure_NVV
Data.Comment: Stored value of the atmospheric pressure

Data.Name: Battery Voltage
Data.Comment: Battery voltage

Data.Name: Boost Pressure
Data.Comment: pression dans le collecteur admission

Data.Name: brake_depressed
Data.Comment: indicates that either the brake light switch or the brake safety

Data.Name: BusOff module
Data.Comment: diagnostic of "bus off module"

Data.Name: C2I cylinder 1
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 1

Data.Name: C2I cylinder 2
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 2

Data.Name: C2I cylinder 3
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 3

Data.Name: C2I cylinder 4
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 4

Item.Text: C2i of cylinder 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 2 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 2 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 3 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 3 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 3 and 2 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 3 and 2 and 1 a has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 2 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 2 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 3 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 3 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 3 and 2 has been successfully written

Data.Name: Calibration No
Data.Comment: Numero de calibration en Hexa

Data.Name: Checked_injected_fuel_demand
Data.Comment: total diesel fuel

Data.Name: Checked_main_fuel_demand
Data.Comment: main fuel demand

Data.Name: Checked_pilot2_fuel_demand
Data.Comment: pilot fuel demand

Data.Name: Chkd_main_timing_demand
Data.Comment: Checked/limited main injection timing demand

Data.Name: Configuration cold loop CAN
Data.Comment: configuration Climatisation boucle froide CAN reonnue

Data.Name: Configuration regulator/limitor speed
Data.Comment: configuration véhicule avec regulateur et limiteur de vitesse

Data.Name: Coolant Temperature Linearised
Data.Comment: coolant temperature linearised

Data.Name: Couple calculé mode2
Data.Comment: couple calculé au roue et stocké en OBD mode 2 / OBD load

Item.Text: assembly line testing and after-sales session

Data.Name: DTC
Data.Comment: diagnostic trouble code

Item.Text: Turbo Charger Bypass Valve Control Circuit
Fuel Composition Sensor Circuit/Water in Fuel
Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error
Engine Hot Lamp Output Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "A" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "B" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "C" Relay Control Circuit

Data.Name: EGR activation
Data.Comment: output activated & tested by Static test

Data.Name: EGR drive duty cycle
Data.Comment: RCO de commande de la vanne EGR solénoïde ou motorisée

Data.Name: EGR feedback
Data.Comment: Percentage defining the current EGR valve position

Data.Name: EGR valve actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de la vanne EGR

Data.Name: EGR_configuration
Data.Comment: Porteur de configuration circuit EGR

Data.Name: EGR_pos_offset
Data.Comment: Value of EGR_Position at which the EGR valve is closed

Data.Name: EGR_position
Data.Comment: Validated and filtered value defining the position of the EGR valve

Data.Name: EGRV_demand
Data.Comment: EGR target from valve solénoïde or motorized

Data.Name: Engine performance reduction
Data.Comment: performance moteur réduite du à un défaut détecté par le système

Data.Name: Engine security test
Data.Comment: coupure moteur suite à une demande logiciel

Data.Name: Engine_stop_request_status
Data.Comment: Concatenation of all the ESR bits in order to request an engine stop

Data.Name: ESS_at_APS_event
Data.Comment: Value of APS_event_count when ESS event occurs. It is used to improve synchronisation

Data.Name: Exhaust pressure
Data.Comment: Contre pression echappement

Data.Name: Fault mileage
Data.Comment: kilométrage effectué avec la panne présente

Data.Name: Fault order
Data.Comment: ordre d'apparition de la panne

Data.Name: FirstDTC
Data.Comment: diagnostic trouble code

Item.Text: Turbo Charger Bypass Valve Control Circuit
Fuel Rail / System pressure - Too Low
Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error
Engine Hot Lamp Output Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "A" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "B" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "C" Relay Control Circuit
Exhaust Gas Recirculation Cooling Valve Control Circuit/Open

Data.Name: Freon pressure
Data.Comment: Measured freon pressure

Data.Name: Fuel Pump Secondary actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'actionneur IMV

Data.Name: Fuel Temperature
Data.Comment: température du gazoil en interne pompe

Data.Name: Fuel Temperature Linearised
Data.Comment: Fuel temperature linearised

Data.Name: Gear_ratio
Data.Comment: Currently selected gear

Data.Name: Hardware No
Data.Comment: reference HARD du calculateur en B.C.D

Data.Name: Idle Target
Data.Comment: Calculated speed that the engine is trying to achieve during steady state idle conditions

Data.Name: IM_current_demand
Data.Comment: current trim for the IM valve, calculated from the pressure error

Data.Name: IM_current_trim_diag
Data.Comment: current trim for diagnossis

Data.Name: IMV ctrl state
Data.Comment: IMV control state

Data.Name: Inj_bal_delta_speed_0
Data.Comment: Difference in the instantaneous speed for injector X-2 and for injector X-1

Data.Name: Inj_bal_delta_speed_1
Data.Comment: Difference in the instantaneous speed for injector X-2 and for injector X-1

Data.Name: Inj_bal_delta_speed_2
Data.Comment: Difference in the instantaneous speed for injector X-2 and for injector X-1

Data.Name: Inj_bal_delta_speed_3
Data.Comment: Difference in the instantaneous speed for injector X-2 and for injector X-1

Data.Name: Injector cylinder 2 actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'injecteur du cylindre 2

Data.Name: Injector cylinder 3 actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'injecteur du cylindre 3

Data.Name: Injector cylinder 4 actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'injecteur du cylindre 4

Data.Name: Key_voltage
Data.Comment: Key_voltage ; Key voltage read by the ADC

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_1_1600
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 1 at 1600 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_1_200
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 1 at 200 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_2_1600
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 2 at 1600 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_2_200
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 2 at 200 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_3_1600
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 3 at 1600 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_3_200
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 3 at 200 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_4_1600
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 4 at 1600 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_4_200
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 4 at 200 bars

Data.Name: MDP_NUMBER_OF_UPDATE_INJ_1
Data.Comment: Number of times the injector 1 has been updated limited between 0 and 255

Data.Name: MDP_NUMBER_OF_UPDATE_INJ_2
Data.Comment: Number of times the injector 2 has been updated limited between 0 and 255

Data.Name: MDP_NUMBER_OF_UPDATE_INJ_3
Data.Comment: Number of times the injector 3 has been updated limited between 0 and 255

Data.Name: MDP_NUMBER_OF_UPDATE_INJ_4
Data.Comment: Number of times the injector 4 has been updated limited between 0 and 255

Data.Name: Mute module
Data.Comment: diagnostic of "mute module"

Data.Name: Mux messaging reference
Data.Comment: Messaging version N° identification

Data.Name: N° du PID OBD
Data.Comment: OBD DTC of the fault in the Freeze Frame

Data.Name: NHOMOL
Data.Comment: n° homologation du calculateur/ Approval number

Data.Name: No_of_current_hard_fault
Data.Comment: Number of present Hard faults

Data.Name: OBD actif
Data.Comment: OBD mode active

Data.Name: OBD legal conditions
Data.Comment: OBD legislative conditions satisfied

Data.Name: Other system specifics
Data.Comment: utilisé pour le VMAP et la date synthèse calib en Hexa

Data.Name: Pedal position
Data.Comment: Pedal Position

Data.Name: Period_off_1_corrected
Data.Comment: Off time from the CTP1 until the start of pilot injection pulse corrected for injector differences

Data.Name: Period_off_2_corrected
Data.Comment: Off time from CTP12until thestart of the pilot injection pulse corrected for injector differences

Data.Name: Period_off_3_corrected
Data.Comment: Off time from end of pilot 2 inj until tart of the main inj pulse corrected for injectors difference

Data.Name: Period_on_1_corrected
Data.Comment: Total time duration of the pilot injection pulse on CTP1 corrected for injector differences

Data.Name: Period_on_2_corrected
Data.Comment: Total time duration of the first injection pulse on CTP2 corrected for injector differences

Data.Name: Period_on_3_corrected
Data.Comment: Total time duration of the second injection pulse on CTP2 corrected for injector differences

Data.Name: PID supporté
Data.Comment: n° de PID remonté par l'OBD service $02/ Supported PID for OBD service $02

Data.Name: Piece No
Data.Comment: Reference du boitier programme (hard + soft + calib)

Data.Name: porteur Engine state
Data.Comment: état moteur

Data.Name: porteur Etat DSM
Data.Comment: donne les différent état géré par le gestionnaire de pannes

Data.Name: porteur état OBD
Data.Comment: donne les différents états du gestionnaire OBD

Data.Name: porteur RVL_1
Data.Comment: carrier for data received from BCM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_2
Data.Comment: carrier for data received from BCM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_3
Data.Comment: carrier for physical data acquired from ECM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_4
Data.Comment: carrier for physical data acquired from ECM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_5
Data.Comment: carrier for data producted by ECM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_6
Data.Comment: carrier for data producted by ECM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_7
Data.Comment: carrier for data producted by ECM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_8
Data.Comment: carrier for data producted by ECM

Data.Name: PPH_control_state
Data.Comment: this indicates the state of PRE/POST Heating

Data.Name: Prail sensor linearised voltage
Data.Comment: Rail pressure voltage for freeze frame

Data.Name: Pression collecteur mode2
Data.Comment: Boost pressure

Data.Name: Rail pressure demand
Data.Comment: consigne de pression rail

Data.Name: Rail pressure feedback
Data.Comment: pression dans le rail d'injection

Data.Name: Rail pressure linearised
Data.Comment: Rail pressure linearised

Data.Name: RAILP_CAL_NVV
Data.Comment: Copy of Rail_pressure_feedback made during Detection of Rail Pressure Calibration Faults

Data.Name: recovery mode activation
Data.Comment: enclenchement d'un mode dégradé (fuel_reducted, CE lamp...)

Data.Name: Régime mode2
Data.Comment: Engine speed

Data.Name: Sel_pilot2_sepn_demand
Data.Comment: Pilot timing demand value selected from the mapped value, the ECI value, or the development inputs

Data.Name: Sensor Voltage linearised
Data.Comment: sensor voltage linearised

Data.Name: Soft engine stop request
Data.Comment: activation de la stratégie de coupure moteur temporisée

Data.Name: Software No
Data.Comment: Application logiciel en Hexa

Data.Name: Status du defaut
Data.Comment: Status of DTC

Item.Text: memory fault - short circuit to ground
memory fault - short circuit at battery
memory fault - parameter at limit min
memory fault - parameter at limit max
memory fault - value out of range
memory fault - open circuit or short circuit to ground
memory fault - open circuit or short circuit to battery
current fault - short circuit to ground
current fault - short circuit at battery
current fault - parameter at limit min
current fault - parameter at limit max
current fault - value out of range
current fault - open circuit or short circuit to ground
current fault - open circuit or short circuit to battery
memory fault - noise on injector line
memory fault - IM current trim low fuel high
memory fault - IM current trim high fuel high
memory fault - IM current trim low fuel low
memory fault - IM current trimhigh fuel low
current fault - noise on injector line
current fault - IM current trim low fuel high
current fault - IM current trim high fuel high
current fault - IM current trim low fuel low
current fault - IM current trimhigh fuel low

Data.Name: Supplier No
Data.Comment: Numero ITG du fournisseur en ASCII

Data.Name: Température eau mode2
Data.Comment: température eau stocké en OBD mode 2 / Coolant temperature

Data.Name: Turbo activation
Data.Comment: info de détection du turbo

Data.Name: Turbo actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande du turbo

Data.Name: Ucollecteur
Data.Comment: information électrique capteur pression collecteur admission / Boost pressure voltage

Data.Name: Udébimètre
Data.Comment: information tension debimetre d'air/ AMF voltage

Data.Name: Uexhaust
Data.Comment: information électrique capteur pression echappement/ Exhaust pressure voltage

Data.Name: Upédal1
Data.Comment: Pedal 1 voltage

Data.Name: Upédal2
Data.Comment: information tension pédale piste 2

Data.Name: Upotegr
Data.Comment: information tension potentiomètre vanne EGR/ EGR potentiometer voltage

Data.Name: Uprail
Data.Comment: Rail pressure voltage

Data.Name: Vehicle distance
Data.Comment: Total vehicle distance travelled

Data.Name: Vehicle speed
Data.Comment: This value describes the measures vehicle speed

Data.Name: Version No
Data.Comment: Niveau de calibration en Hexa

Data.Name: VGT_ctl_ofs_pwm_nvv
Data.Comment: PWM offset for VGT

Data.Name: VGT_so_final_PWM
Data.Comment: PWM output signal to component driver

Data.Name: VGT_so_state
Data.Comment: etat de commande du turbo à géométrie variable / Regulation State

Data.Name: VGT_sp_pressure
Data.Comment: Set point pressure value

Data.Name: Vitesse véhicule mode2
Data.Comment: Vitesse véhicule stocké en OBD mode 2

Data.Name: VLC_fuel_offset_nvt0
Data.Comment: Memorized fuel offset for VLC strategy

Data.Name: VLC_fuel_offset_nvt1
Data.Comment: Memorized fuel offset for VLC strategy

Data.Name: Voltage pedal 2_
Data.Comment: voltage pedal 2 for freeze frame

Data.Name: Manufacturer Code
Data.Comment: Ce code a toujours la valeur 0x00

Data.Name: Memory Size
Data.Comment: the number of bytes to be read according to the address specified on the request.

Data.Name: Memory Address -Response-
Data.Comment: Adresse de la zone memoire equivalente a celle figurant dans la requete

Data.Name: OVT_Nb_driver_request
Data.Comment: Number of driver request since last power up

Data.Name: OVT_Nb_enable
Data.Comment: Number of times OVT has been raised since last power up

Data.Name: CAN_Vehicle_speed
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed from CAN

Data.Name: Air_Temperature
Data.Comment: External air temperature from the air temperature sensor

Data.Name: Vehicle_speed_change_rate
Data.Comment: A measure of vehicle acceleration / deceleration

Data.Name: EGR_Valve_saturated
Data.Comment: The EGR valve is saturated

Data.Name: EGR_thtrl_dmnd_saturated
Data.Comment: The throttle is saturated

Data.Name: EGR_Throttle_Pwm_duty_cycle
Data.Comment: Duty cycle of the EGR throttle valve control PWM signal

Data.Name: EGR_Bypass_ctrl_out
Data.Comment: PWM demand for the EGR bypass valve

Data.Name: VGT_So_operation_state
Data.Comment: Turbo operation state / Waste gate control state

Data.Name: EGR_Off
Data.Comment: Request to switch to EGR off state

Data.Name: MDP_Num_of_update_successes_NVV
Data.Comment: Number of successful MDP updates

Data.Name: MDP_Num_of_update_failures_NVV
Data.Comment: Number of times the MDP update failed to learn a valid value

Data.Name: EGR_Pos_offset_last_learn_NVV
Data.Comment: Last learnt EGR valve position offset

Data.Name: EGR_pos_offset_first_learn_nvv
Data.Comment: First learnt EGR valve position offset

Data.Name: EGR_pos_offset_learn_done_nvv
Data.Comment: EGR valve position offsets have been learnt

Data.Name: CAN_TDB_Displayed_speed
Data.Comment: Displayed vehicle speed

Data.Name: C2i cyl1
Data.Comment: C2i cylinder 1 for writing

Data.Name: C2i cyl2
Data.Comment: C2i cylinder 2 for writing

Data.Name: C2i cyl3
Data.Comment: C2i cylinder 3 for writing

Data.Name: C2i cyl4
Data.Comment: C2i cylinder 4 for writing

Data.Name: C2I cylinder
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour tous les cylindres

Data.Name: OBD Warm up cycle complete
Data.Comment: Warm up cycle complete

Data.Name: OBD_test_ALL_class_dc_status
Data.Comment: This flag indicates that all failure paths have been tested

Data.Name: OBD_EGR_class_dc_status
Data.Comment: This flag shows whether or not all DTC Failures in the class EGR have been tested

Data.Name: OBD_CATALYST_class_dc_status
Data.Comment: This flag shows whether or not all DTC Failures in the class CATALYSYT have been tested

Data.Name: OBD_MISFIRE_class_dc_status
Data.Comment: This flag shows whether or not all DTC Failures in the class MISFIRE have been tested

Data.Name: OBD_FUEL_SYS_class_dc_status
Data.Comment: This flag shows whether or not all DTC Failures in the class FUEL_SYSTEM have been tested

Data.Name: OBD_OTHER_COMP_class_dc_status
Data.Comment: This flag shows whether or not all DTC Failures in the class OTHER COMPONENTS have been tested

Data.Name: DCAN_ECU_ID_PROD_FRAME_APV (Iduce)
Data.Comment: producer for functionnal diagnosis frame

Data.Name: Brake_light_switch_active (Frein1)
Data.Comment: Multiplex closed brake switch input

Data.Name: CC_Brake_2_mem_failure(Pm2cfre)
Data.Comment: Both of brake switch memorised failure

Data.Name: CC_Brake_2_pres_failure(Pp2cfre)
Data.Comment: Both of brake switch current failure

Data.Name: CC_CO_Cruise_control_lamp(Affrvmx)
Data.Comment: §CC CO cruise control lamp

Item.Text: fonctions CC/SL not presents on vehicle

Data.Name: CC_CO_Cruise_control_status(Etarvmx)
Data.Comment: Cruise control status

Data.Name: CC_CO_Target_speed_blink(Cligvcmx)
Data.Comment: Requested Speed Blink

Data.Name: CC_CS_Accel_switch_engaged(setplsap)
Data.Comment: Set and Plus switch pressed

Data.Name: CC_CS_Cruise_switch_state(Rvon)
Data.Comment: CC On/Off switch pressed

Data.Name: CC_CS_Decel_switch_engaged(Setmnsap)
Data.Comment: Set and Minus switch pressed

Data.Name: CC_CS_Limiter_switch_state(Lvon)
Data.Comment: SL On/Off switch pressed

Data.Name: CC_CS_Resume_request(Repap)
Data.Comment: Resume switch pressed

Data.Name: CC_CS_Suspend_request(Suspap)
Data.Comment: Suspend switch pressed

Data.Name: CC_Norm_deac_NVV = CC_SUSP_ASR(Dacnasr)
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to ASR request

Data.Name: CC_Norm_deac_NVV = CC_SUSP_BRAKING(Dacncfre)
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to brake application

Data.Name: CC_Norm_deac_NVV = CC_SUSP_DECLUTCH(Dacnbv)
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to engine/gearbox disconnection

Data.Name: CC_Norm_deac_NVV = CC_SUSP_DRIVER(Dacnsusp)
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to suspend switch press

Data.Name: CC_Norm_deac_NVV = CC_SUSP_SPD_RATIO(Dacnrvit)
Data.Comment: Deactivation because set speed/vehicle speed ratio is incoherent

Data.Name: CC_TS_Target_speed(VITCONMX)
Data.Comment: requested speed selected by driver

Data.Name: Clutch_switch_connected_NVV(Cnxemb)
Data.Comment: state change detection clutch contact

Data.Name: COOL_TEMP_FLT_MEMORISED(Pmeau)
Data.Comment: Water memorised failure

Data.Name: COOL_TEMP_FLT_RECOVERY(Ppeau)
Data.Comment: Water current failure

Data.Name: Cruise_control_present_NVV(Cnxrv)
Data.Comment: state change detection RV position with security on configuration detection (on/off and off/on)

Data.Name: DCAN_ECU_ID_CCSL_FRAME_APT_2(prorlvz3)
Data.Comment: producer of Identify the previous data area's producer

Data.Name: DCAN_ECU_ID_CCSL_FRAME_APT_3(Prorlvz4)
Data.Comment: Identify the previous data area's producer

Data.Name: DCAN_ECU_ID_CLIM_FRAME_APT_0(proclmz1)
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°1 for functionnal climate control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: DCAN_ECU_ID_CLIM_FRAME_APT_1(proclmz2)
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°2 for functionnal climate control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: DCAN_ECU_ID_CLIM_FRAME_APT_2(proclmz3)
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°3 for functionnal climate control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: DCAN_ECU_ID_CLIM_FRAME_APT_3(proclmz4)
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°4 for functionnal climate control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: DCAN_ECU_ID_KEYLESS_FRAME_APT_0(provscz1)
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°1 for functionnal vsc engine states control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: DCAN_ECU_ID_KEYLESS_FRAME_APT_1(provscz2)
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°2 for functionnal vsc engine states control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: DCAN_ECU_ID_KEYLESS_FRAME_APT_2(provscz3)
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°3 for functionnal vsc engine states control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: Diagnostic No(VDIAG)
Data.Comment: Diag evolution number

Data.Name: Driver_commands_connected_NVV (Cnxbtvol)
Data.Comment: state change detection one of 4 steering wheel switches

Data.Name: Engine_running_allowed_NVV(Autftmem)
Data.Comment: Stored value of Autftmot

Item.Text: engine stop request from Airbag Crash

Data.Name: EngineRPM_84(REGMUX)
Data.Comment: CAN_Engine_speed: Engine speed or $FFFF if not available

Data.Name: Fuel Pump Secondary activation(IMV_fitted)
Data.Comment: sortie détectée et testée par le test statique

Data.Name: Gear_change_in_progress(Chgrapor)
Data.Comment: Shift in progress

Data.Name: Gearbox_fan_request(Cmdgmvbv)
Data.Comment: FAN request activation from AT

Data.Name: iv_function_status_1(FTDIVST1)
Data.Comment: carrier ftdivst1

Data.Name: iv_function_status_2(FTDIVST2)
Data.Comment: carrier ftdivst2

Data.Name: KLS_AT_Cranking_authorization(cpytopat)
Data.Comment: AT via ECM Cranking Authorisation

Data.Name: KLS_Cranking_authorization(Topecm)
Data.Comment: ECM Crnaking authorisation

Data.Name: KLS_Cranking_failure(Defdem)
Data.Comment: Starter fault

Data.Name: KLS_Cranking_forbidden_by_EMS(Dmdspec)
Data.Comment: Specific request

Data.Name: KLS_Engine_state(Etamotmx)
Data.Comment: Engine status

Data.Name: MDP_Number_out_of_zone_NVV(RECALOUT)
Data.Comment: Number of times of MDP update abortion due to the updates moving out of the allowed update area

Data.Name: Open_brake_sw_connected_NVV(Cnxfr3)
Data.Comment: state change detection on oêned brake switch

Data.Name: PTC_Cutoff_request(vbx_cut_off)
Data.Comment: CTP cut_request

Data.Name: PTC_Freeze_request(vbx_frz)
Data.Comment: CTP freeze request

Data.Name: Speed_limiter_present_NVV(Cnxlv)
Data.Comment: state change detection LV position with security on configuration detection (on/off and off/on)

Data.Name: Stored_crash_detected(Crashmem)
Data.Comment: Diag. byte stored upon reception of a coherent Airbag_crash frame

Data.Name: Total_fuel_consumption_NVV(CONSOMAP)
Data.Comment: formatted fuel consumption for tuning needs

Data.Name: Turbo_demand(VGT_Sp_pressure)
Data.Comment: pression turbo demandée

Data.Name: AC_Comp_pressure/2(PRSCLIM/2)
Data.Comment: air conditioning pressure measured (divided by 2)

Data.Name: AC_COMP_PRESSURE_FLT_SOFT(Ppprsclm)
Data.Comment: Climate pressure current failure

Data.Name: AC_Inhib_synthesis(Climot)
Data.Comment: Climate inhibition produce by engine

Data.Name: AC_Power_absorbed(ACLOAD)
Data.Comment: Calculated AC load; (limited to 0xFF)

Data.Name: AC_Raised_idle_request(Ralacc)
Data.Comment: engine idle speeded up request

Data.Name: AC_Type_configuration_NVV != AC_NONE(Cnxac)
Data.Comment: ECM/AC link connected

Data.Name: DCAN_ECU_ID_CCSL_FRAME_APT_0(Prorlvz1)
Data.Comment: Identify the previous data area's producer

Data.Name: DCAN_ECU_ID_CCSL_FRAME_APT_1(Prorlvz2)
Data.Comment: Identify the previous data area's producer

Data.Name: Clutch_switch_active(Embrayage)
Data.Comment: Clutch contact boolean

Data.Name: CC_Brake_1_pres_failure (Pp1cfre-UCH)
Data.Comment: One of brake switch current failure

Data.Name: CC_Brake_1_mem_failure(Pm1cfre-UCH)
Data.Comment: One of brake switch memorised failure

Data.Name: CC_Brake_1_mem_failure(Pm1cfre-ECM)
Data.Comment: One of brake switch memorised failure

Data.Name: CC_Brake_1_pres_failure(Pp1cfre-ECM)
Data.Comment: One of brake switch memorised failure

Data.Name: Brake_safety_switch_active(Frein3)
Data.Comment: Wire connection opened brake switch input (normally closed)

Data.Name: CC_Abnorm_deac_failure_NVV(Dacarvlv)
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to C/SL failure detection

Data.Name: CC_Abnorm_deac_ems_NVV(Dacacm)
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to engine control problem

Data.Name: CC_Abnorm_deac_at_limp_home_NVV(Vbx_cru_sl_lih_daca)
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to gearbox limp home

Data.Name: CC_Abnorm_deac_vspd_invld_NVV(Dacappvv)
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to vehicle speed default

Data.Name: CAN_Ptc_idle_speed_increase(vbx_ptc_idle_spd_inc)
Data.Comment: engine idle speeded-up request from UCH

Data.Name: CAN_AC_Request(Accycmx)
Data.Comment: cycling request from UCH (CAN_AC_request)

Data.Name: Memorised fault set for AC_COMP_PRESSURE_FLT(Pmprsclm)
Data.Comment: Climate pressure memorised failure

Data.Name: CAN_AC_Active(Acoutmx)
Data.Comment: A.C. compressor can activation request (CAN_AC_Active)

Data.Name: CAN_Fan_speed_request_lsb(Gmvoutmx_1)
Data.Comment: Fan 1 can activation request

Data.Name: CAN_Fan_speed_request_msb(Gmvoutmx_2)
Data.Comment: Fan 2 can activation request

Data.Name: CAN_PTC_Power_limitation(vxx_max_pw_autho)
Data.Comment: calculated max powerPTC authorized

Data.Name: CAN_UPC_Starter_status(Statudem)
Data.Comment: Status of starter

Data.Name: Key_off_engaged = FALSE(Contact)
Data.Comment: APC on

Data.Name: CAN_PPH_Lamp(Prechout)
Data.Comment: Diesel Pre heating

Data.Name: CAN_AT_Cranking_authorization(Topat)
Data.Comment: AT cranking authorisation

Data.Name: Injector_HSD_monitor_voltage(HSD_mon)
Data.Comment: injector high side drive monitor voltage

Data.Name: IM_current_trim_int_init_0
Data.Comment: First initialisation term used to calculate IM_Current_trim_int

Data.Name: IM_current_trim_int_init_1
Data.Comment: Second initialisation term used to calculate IM_Current_trim_int

Data.Comment: air extern temperature for freeze frame

Data.Comment: Battery Voltage for freeze frame

Data.Comment: coolant temperature linearised

Data.Comment: Coolant temp for freeze frame

Data.Comment: Engine speed for freeze frame

Data.Name: Fuel Flow_
Data.Comment: Fuel Flow for freeze frame

Data.Name: Fuel Temperature_
Data.Comment: Fuel temperature for freeze frame

Data.Comment: No data for freeze frame

Data.Name: Dispatch Number
Data.Comment: Dispatch Number (Ascii)

Data.Name: Serial Number
Data.Comment: Serial Number (Ascii)

Data.Name: Status of reading of Serial and Dispatch numbers
Data.Comment: $31 if not valid; $20 otherwise

Data.Name: reserved_data_traceability(TRACABTY)
Data.Comment: reserved data traceability

Data.Name: Air mass flow feedback
Data.Comment: Calculated or measured air mass flow rate per stroke

Data.Name: CAN_CoolantTemp84(EAUMUX)
Data.Comment: CAN_Coolant_temperature

Data.Name: CAN_UCH_External_Temp
Data.Comment: External air temperature from UCH

Data.Name: KM_recorder_with_CE_Lamp_ON
Data.Comment: Kilometer with gravity 1 lamp ON

Data.Name: Cleappli
Data.Comment: APPLI_KEY state

Data.Name: Needtool
Data.Comment: Decrit l'échec ou le bon déroulement de l'apprentissage du code verrou

Data.Name: SkeyFailEep
Data.Comment: Indique une anomalie dans la sauvegarde du code en EEPROM

Item.Text: 0 - Pas de problème de sauvegarde du code en EEPROM
1 - Problème de sauvegarde du code en EEPROM

Data.Name: SkeyState
Data.Comment: Skey backup area: Indique le niveau de sauvegarde du code

Data.Name: CAN_CE_Lamp(Gravite1)
Data.Comment: Can_CE_lamp

Data.Name: CAN_Major_Fault_Lamp(Gravite2)
Data.Comment: CAN_Major_fault_lamp

Item.Text: TRUE - default injection gravity 2 ; tied motor stop

Data.Name: CAN_Cool_Lamp(Alertomx)
Data.Comment: Can Cool lamp

Data.Name: Configuration cold loop Wire
Data.Comment: configuration climatisation Boucle Froide filaire reonnue

Data.Name: PPH relay actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande du relais de préchauffage

Data.Name: Boost pressure Linearised
Data.Comment: Pression collecteur linearised

Data.Name: VLC_State
Data.Comment: VLC Status

Data.Name: Max_Fuel_airdns_map
Data.Comment: Fuel quantity required to reduce smoke in transient conditiond

Data.Name: AC_Low_cooling_gas_load (Vxx_I_prs_ac_diag)
Data.Comment: Too low cooling gas load

Data.Name: CC_Norm_deac_NVV = CC_SUSP_GEAR(Dacnpm)
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to AGB at neutral detection

Data.Name: MDP_Last_update_km
Data.Comment: Vehicle distance since last MDP update

Data.Name: MDP_Num_of_update
Data.Comment: Number of MDP updates

Data.Name: Air inlet Temperature
Data.Comment: Air temperature inlet from the air temperature inlet sensor

Data.Name: Injector cylinder 1 actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'injecteur du cylindre 1

Data.Name: VGT_So_operation_state_
Data.Comment: Turbo operation state / Waste gate control state for freeze frame

Data.Name: Porteur_Class_Test_Status
Data.Comment: Carrier of test status for all classes

Data.Name: Watchdog fault_
Data.Comment: Panne watchdog mémorisée en nvv

Data.Name: Water_In_Fuel_Connected_NVV
Data.Comment: Detection of presence of sensor for water in Fuel

Data.Name: CAN_ECU_Connection_NVT[1](Cnxuc9)
Data.Comment: AT mux state connection

Data.Name: EGR_Off_
Data.Comment: Request to switch to EGR off state for freeze frame

Data.Name: EGR_pos_offset_first_learn_nvv_
Data.Comment: First learnt EGR valve position offset for freeze frame

Data.Name: EGR_THRTL_ON_OFF_Saturated
Data.Comment: Saturation volet for freeze frame

Data.Name: EGR_BP_State_
Data.Comment: Etat By pass for freeze frame

Data.Name: Engine_cycle_speed(REG01)
Data.Comment: Engine speed

Data.Name: Checked_main_fuel_demand_
Data.Comment: main fuel demand

Data.Name: Configuration Gearbox
Data.Comment: configuration véhicule avec boite de vitesse robotisée ou automatique

Data.Name: CC_CS_BUTTONS_FLT_HARD(Ppcomvol)
Data.Comment: Steering wheel control buttons current failure

Data.Name: CC_CS_BUTTONS_FLT_MEMORISED(Pmcomvol)
Data.Comment: Steering wheel control buttons memorised failure

Data.Name: CC_CS_SWITCH_FLT_HARD(Ppboutma)
Data.Comment: Inconsistency on/off switch current failure

Data.Name: CC_CS_SWITCH_FLT_MEMORISED(Pmboutma)
Data.Comment: Inconsistency on/off switch memorised failure

Data.Name: Etapro
Data.Comment: Boolean indicating whether status is protected

Item.Text: assembly line testing and after-sales session
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: IM_EOL_Priming_done_NVV
Data.Comment: Completion of the first pump housing filling

Item.Text: IM current trim low fuel high
IM current trim high fuel high
IM current trim low fuel low

Data.Name: InjectorCode.hexa.1
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 1

Data.Name: InjectorCode.hexa.2
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 2

Data.Name: InjectorCode.hexa.3
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 3

Data.Name: InjectorCode.hexa.4
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 4

Data.Name: InjectorCode.Status.Write
Data.Comment: Status of writes

Item.Text: C2i of cylinder 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 2 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 2 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 3 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 3 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 3 and 2 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 3 and 2 and 1 a has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 2 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 2 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 3 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 3 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 3 and 2 has been successfully written

Data.Name: InjectorCode.hexa.All
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour tous les cylindres

Request.Name: Frame Functional VSC Engine State diagnosis

DataItem.Name: Status of reading of Serial and Dispatch numbers

Device.Name: Engine Coolant Heater "C" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "B" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "A" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Hot Lamp Output Control Circuit
Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error
Turbo Charger Bypass Valve Control Circuit
Exhaust Gas Recirculation Cooling Valve Control Circuit/Open
Fuel Rail / System pressure - Too Low

Label.Text: Frame 5 Diag RENAULT CLIM and VSC

Label.Text: ATTENTION, Parameters length has to be 62 Bytes
Attention!!! Writings not possible unless immobilizer is active
Attention l'écriture VIN est irréversible; Le code verlog doit être appris
are the default values of the C2I
WARNING!!! C2I Writing not possible unless immobilizer is active
